name: Tex-Mex Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3-4 pound chicken, halved with backbone removed
recipeInstructions:
MARINADE
6 garlic cloves, crushed
1 tbsp cayenne pepper
1 tbsp white pepper
2 tbsp paprika
Salt to taste
1. Wash the chicken thoroughly and pat dry.
2. Rub both sides of the chicken halves with half a lemon.
3. In a small bowl, mix the garlic and spices.
4. Rub the mixture on both sides of the chicken.
5. Place the chicken halves, skin-side up, in a shallow baking dish.
6. Allow the chicken to stand covered in the refrigerator for 24 hours.
7. Place the chicken halves, skin-side up, 4-5 inches from mesquite coals.
8. Cover and grill for 20 minutes, turning and grilling at 20 to 30 minute intervals.
9. Total cooking time is about 1 1/2 hours.
